ddls:
CREATE TABLE "clubs" (
  "club_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each club */,
  "club_name" TEXT /* Name of the club */,
  "founded" TEXT /* Date the club was founded */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the stadium where the club plays */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the club's home ground */,
  "team_value" TEXT /* Current team value (in millions) */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Name of the club's owner */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the club's manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("club_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season (e.g., 1992/1993) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the season started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the season ended */,
  "champion" TEXT /* Name of the league champion */,
  "relegated_clubs" TEXT /* Names of relegated clubs (comma-separated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "club_id" INTEGER /* ID of the club */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Final position of the club in the league */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points accumulated by the club in the season */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the season ended */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Total goals scored by the club in the season */,
  "goals_conceded" INTEGER /* Total goals conceded by the club in the season */,
  "goal_difference" INTEGER /* Goal difference (goals scored - goals conceded) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_club_id FOREIGN KEY ("club_id") REFERENCES clubs ("club_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, public) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., view_data, edit_data, delete_data) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_data" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match record */,
  "club_id" INTEGER /* ID of the club */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date the match was played */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opponent club */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the match (e.g., win, loss, draw) */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Goals scored by the club in the match */,
  "goals_conceded" INTEGER /* Goals conceded by the club in the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_data_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES clubs ("club_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_data_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_data_club_id FOREIGN KEY ("club_id") REFERENCES clubs ("club_id")
)
